NETWORK_ERROR: Network request failed — check the connection to your server
AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: Session expired — please sign in again
NOT_FOUND: The resource does not exist or was deleted
RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests — try again later
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this operation
INTERNAL: Internal server error — try again later
INTERNAL_UNKNOWN: The operation failed — try again later
NET_TLS_CERT: The target server's TLS certificate is invalid (expired or self-signed). If you trust it, enable “Skip TLS certificate verification” when editing
NET_TIMEOUT: Connection to the target server timed out — check that it is online
NET_REFUSED: The target server refused the connection — check the port and service status
NET_DNS: The hostname could not be resolved — check the address
